name: Coconut-Almond Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:45
1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Have water boiling in a double boiler.
2. Place the egg whites in the top part of the double boiler and blend in sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Cook over the boiling water, stirring constantly for 20 minutes.
3. Add coconut and almond extract. Stir until well combined.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 1/2-inch apart onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 300 degrees for 18-20 minutes, or until lightly browned. Do not overcook. Remove to wire rack to cool completely.
Yield: about 24 macaroons.
